narrative:
Williamsburg Twp township has 3,783 registered voters, with 54.7% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 34.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 10.4%, a pronounced Republican lean of 24.5 percentage points.
